title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・『嬉しい』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon overcomes her rivals and wins
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She feels happiness for the first time and is at a
loss for how to deal with the emotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having tasted the joy of victory, she begins to
crave more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, we decide to enter the Japan Cup,
where the powerful Tokai Teio will surely be
racing.
